title: VanillaVariations
description: Enhances the vanilla experience by staying close to it while adding more content.
body:
# VanillaVariations

Enhances the vanilla experience by staying close to it while adding more content.

![The end dimention](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/107616375/236235316-c41a20df-e590-4bef-adfb-4a499e9a1e98.png)

It primarly adds new fooditems, and new farmland for all your nether-farming wants.
You'll have to farm to be able to get all the new items!

Translations:

Chinese: [junshengxie](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/junshengxie/projects)
